zh.lifeSummary: 當Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan於大約0990年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯姆奧藍--易維林斯時，他的父親Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan32歲，母親Adela de Vexin22歲。他和Adelais至少有2個兒子。他去世於1069年10月8日在他的家鄉享年80歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
English (Kent): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Siegmund.
German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Galeran
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish:
habitational name from Galera, the name of several places in Spain.
variant of   Galea   ‘galleon, (war)ship’.

variants.name: Galea
meanings: modern Hebrew name, meaning ‘wave’.

en.lifeSummary: When Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan was born about 0990, in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, his father, Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan, was 32 and his mother, Adela de Vexin, was 22. He had at least 2 sons with Adelais. He died on 8 October 1069, in his hometown, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan est né environ 0990, à Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, son père, Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Adela de Vexin, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Adelais. Il est décédé le 8 octobre 1069, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan um 0990 in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan 32 und seine Mutter Adela de Vexin 22. Er hatte mit Adelais mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 8. Oktober 1069 im Alter von 80 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan è nato il circa 0990 nel Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Adela de Vexin, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Adelais. Morì il 8 ottobre 1069, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulanが約0990年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスメウラン-エン-イベラインスで生まれた時，父Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulanは32歳，母Adela de Vexinは22歳であった。彼はAdelaisとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1069年10月8日に故郷で80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan(이)가 대략 0990년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 우룰아--이벨라이네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Adela de Vexin(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Adelais(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1069년 10월 8일 그의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan nasceu aproximadamente 0990, em Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Adela de Vexin, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Adelais. Ele faleceu em 8 de outubro de 1069, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan родился около 0990 г. в местности меулан-ен-ивелаинесь, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Adela de Vexin, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Adelais. Он умер 8 октября 1069 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 80 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Adelais. Murió el 8 de octubre de 1069, en su pueblo, a la edad de 80 años.
